name: kkiyama117-flow-tools
description: Personal Claude Code plugins for kkiyama117 — workflow automation built on top of the chezmoi-managed claude-tools Go binaries.

plugins.name: kkiyama117-flow-tools
plugins.description: Personal /branch-* slash commands for git worktree + tmux window flow: /branch-out (spawn fresh session), /branch-finish (teardown), /branch-merge (rebase + merge into target). Wraps the claude-tools Go binaries (claude-tmux-new, claude-kill-session, claude-branch-merge).
